summary.shape_sentence: Bearish open-drive liquidation followed by wide midday rotation and a late afternoon recovery that failed below the opening breakdown zone.

goat.note: Opening liquidation from near 26000 into the 25800s was the standout move of the session.

red_circles.behavior: Bearish pivots appeared on failed reclaims near 25900-25920 after the opening breakdown.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots developed around 25800-25830 demand and produced bounces, but no full trend reversal.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 25900-25920 was repeatedly respected and capped the late recovery.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 25800-25830 held on the morning flush and afternoon retest.

time_markers.10am_blue: Post-flush stabilization near 25820-25850 after the opening drive down.
time_markers.12pm_red: Rotational chop below supply, roughly mid-range after the morning selloff.
time_markers.2pm_green: Afternoon weakness retesting lower demand without sustained downside continuation.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Close near 25898, off the lows but still red and below the opening breakdown zone.

takeaway: Bearish open-drive liquidation day with demand defense after the flush and a late recovery that failed to fully reclaim supply.
